positive: Minimalist celestial watercolor wash art, featuring a stylized crescent moon nestled among scattered geometric constellations and gentle flowing nebulae. The color palette should be muted deep indigo, dusty lavender, and shimmering gold leaf accents, creating a dreamlike, cosmic gradient effect. Centered composition, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Crisp, clean linework contrasting against soft washes. Studio quality flat lay composition, high contrast silhouette against a clean white background. Vector art style, graphic, illustrative, celestial map.
